name: Chicken Paprika
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vegetable juice, flour, paprika, and salt in a small bowl; set aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; cook for 1 minute.
3. Add chicken strips to the skillet and cook until they are lightly browned.
4. Stir in the vegetable juice mixture and bring to a boil, stirring often.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and stir in sour cream.
7. Serve over rice and sprinkle with parsley.
Microwave Oven Instructions:
1. Combine vegetable juice, flour, paprika, and salt in a small bowl; set aside.
2. In a medium microproof baking dish, combine olive oil, onions, and garlic. Cover and cook on HIGH (maximum power) for 1 minute.
3. Add chicken strips to the dish and cook for an additional minute on HIGH until they lose their pink color.
4. Stir in the vegetable juice mixture, cover, and cook on HIGH for 2 to 3 minutes or until the mixture boils.
5. Reduce heat to MEDIUM-LOW (30% power) and stir; continue cooking for 15 minutes.
6. Remove from oven and stir in sour cream.
7. Serve over rice and sprinkle with parsley.
Each serving provides:
335 calories
29.2 g. protein
8.6 g. fat
33.4 g. carbohydrate
914 mg. sodium
76 mg. cholesterol
Source: Cooking for Two or a Few
